enum_values.name: Normal
enum_values.summary: Normal render CRC; nothing is excluded.

enum_values.name: ExcludeLinearWorkflow
enum_values.summary: Linear Workflow color and texture changes are not included.

enum_values.name: ExcludeLocalMapping
enum_values.summary: Local mapping is excluded (only used by Textures).

enum_values.name: ExcludeUnits
enum_values.summary: Units are excluded (only used by Textures).

enum_values.name: ExcludeDocumentEffects
enum_values.summary: Use this flag when you want to calculate the CRC independantly of any effect the document has on the content.
